response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: A significant mismatch was detected; the Reference JSON lists 'Kirameki Rider' for the second scene, but the audio is actually 'Trust Me' by Yuuki Aira. The first song 'Bigger and Bigger' is missing from the JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the Reference JSON lyrics due to the mismatch. Performed 100% manual transcription for both songs and the skit dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed vocal events to the exact millisecond. Included translations for prominent on-screen text during the skit. Applied aggressive truncation for the rapid Morse code sequence.

subtitles.original: 夢見るきことが全て始まり
subtitles.english: Dreaming is where it all begins

subtitles.original: 誰より遠くへ飛んでみせるよ
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can fly further than anyone

subtitles.original: 夢見るきことが全て始まり
subtitles.english: Dreaming is where it all begins

subtitles.original: 未来も今も駆け抜けろ
subtitles.english: Run through the future and the now

subtitles.original: Buset, ini sih bener-bener udah keterlaluan.
subtitles.english: Geez, this is really getting out of hand.
I was supposed to be doing my 3D Showcase now,

subtitles.original: terjebak di ruangan yang ada bomnya, terus disuruh mecahin kode morse.
subtitles.english: trapped in a room with a bomb, and told to solve Morse code.

subtitles.original: Aku harus ngapain? Telepon YAGOO terus bilang aku nyasar dan perlu bantuan?
subtitles.english: What should I do? Call YAGOO and tell him I'm lost and need help?
Wait, I think I know what to do!

subtitles.original: Aku nyasar, terjebak, terus ada bom juga.
subtitles.english: I'm lost, trapped, and there's a bomb too.

subtitles.original: Kalau Kamu nggak bisa mecahin kode morse, bisa mampus aku.
subtitles.english: I hope you can solve a Morse code or it's so over.

subtitles.original: Dash dot dash, dot dot dot dot, dot dash, dash dash, dash dash dash, dash dot, dash dot dash, dot dash.
subtitles.english: Dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dash-dot, dash-dot-dash, dot-dash.

subtitles.original: Dash dot dash, dot dot dot dot, dot dash, dash dash, dash dash dash, dash dot, dash dot dash, dot dash.
subtitles.english: Dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dash-dot, dash-dot-dash, dot-dash.
I think the last one is Y... A...

subtitles.original: Aku nggak tahu kamu ngapain, tapi semoga berhasil!
subtitles.english: I don't know what you're doing, but good luck!

subtitles.original: I really want to be with you
subtitles.english: I really want to be with you

subtitles.original: I really want to really want to be with you
subtitles.english: I really want to really want to be with you

subtitles.original: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear
subtitles.english: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear

subtitles.original: So trust me, trust me, trust me yeah
subtitles.english: So trust me, trust me, trust me yeah

subtitles.original: Trust me もう何も恐れないで
subtitles.english: Trust me, don't be afraid of anything anymore

subtitles.original: My dear 見えない糸で
subtitles.english: My dear, with an invisible thread

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋がっているから
ただ感じていてこのぬくもり
ちゃんと聞こえている
僕が脱ぎ捨ててあげる
subtitles.english: I will cast them all away for you
I want to tell you again and again

subtitles.original: 愛はきっとここにある

subtitles.english: It's okay to lean on me

subtitles.original: その全てを受け止めると決めた
subtitles.english: I've decided to accept all of it

subtitles.original: I'm here どこにいたって
subtitles.english: I'm here, no matter where you are

subtitles.original: Trust me この想い解けないから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because these feelings won't unravel
My dear, the burdens you carry

subtitles.original: Trust me 下ろしてみればいい
subtitles.english: Trust me, just try setting them down

subtitles.original: そう君のために僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: Yes, I am here just for you

subtitles.original: Really want to be with you
subtitles.english: Really want to be with you

subtitles.original: Trust me, trust me, trust me yeah
subtitles.english: Trust me, trust me, trust me yeah

subtitles.original: 胸に閉じ込めてきたの
subtitles.english: Have you kept locked in your heart?

subtitles.original: 君は変えてゆけるはず
subtitles.english: One day soon, I know it
Even if things are taken away

subtitles.original: 大事なのは君らしくいること
subtitles.english: The only thing that matters is being yourself

subtitles.original: I'm here たとえ世界が
subtitles.english: I'm here, even if the world
Were to come to an end

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋ぐ手を離さないから
subtitles.english: Trust me, I will never let go of your hand
